manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

matrix

Related words are:

- array
- table
- model

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

message.content: CLUE: A rectangular grid of numbers that represents linear transformations in mathematics.
message.reasoning:
We need to produce CLUE: ... describing "matrix" without using the word or any related words: array, table, model. Must avoid morphological variants: "matrix", "matrices", maybe "matrixes"? Also can't use "array", "arrays", "tabular", "grids"? Related words are array, table, model. Avoid those words and their morphological variants.

Clue must be short. Need to convey matrix: a rectangular arrangement of numbers, used in linear algebra, transformation, etc. But cannot use "array" or "table". Could say "rectangular grid of numbers used in linear algebra". "grid" is okay? Not a related word. So we can use "grid". That's fine. Also "transformation representation". Avoid "model". So CLUE: "Rectangular grid of numbers that represents linear transformations". That's short.

Let's produce CLUE.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A rectangular grid of numbers that represents linear transformations in mathematics.

message.reasoning: We need to guess word based on clue: "A rectangular grid of numbers that represents linear transformations in mathematics." That's a "matrix". So first guess: matrix.
